x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Employee sentiment on HR cases provides the wellbeing signal Now Assist HRSD uses for proactive AI escalation and empathetic response generation. Missing sentiment data limits AI empathy capabilities.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enable sentiment scoring on HR cases via the HRSD sentiment configuration. Train HR agents to capture feedback. Now Assist HRSD uses sentiment signals for AI-driven empathetic responses and proactive escalation.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_07f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c6c
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Employee sentiment on HR cases provides the wellbeing signal Now Assist HRSD uses for proactive AI escalation and empathetic response generation. Missing sentiment data limits AI empathy capabilities.]]></ai_justification><check_name>HR Case Sentiment Data</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var gr=new GlideRecord("sn_hr_core_case");
gr.addNotNullQuery("sentiment");
gr.query();
var n=gr.getRowCount();
return{status:n>=100?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" HR cases with sentiment data",finding:n<100?"Only "+n+" HR cases have sentiment data. Now Assist HRSD uses sentiment for AI-driven empathetic responses and proactive escalation -- insufficient data limits this capability.":""+n+" HR cases with sentiment data -- Now Assist HRSD can leverage sentiment for empathetic AI responses."};
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>HRSD</module><number>CHK0000409</number><order>170</order><remediation_guidance>Enable sentiment scoring on HR cases via the HRSD sentiment configuration. Train HR agents to capture feedback. Now Assist HRSD uses sentiment signals for AI-driven empathetic responses and proactive escalation.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>07f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c6c</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>HR Case Sentiment Data</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_07f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c6c</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
